name: file-hosting-link-intake
anchor: F3.FL classification + F2.FH gate (sibling to B10)
rationale: Broker intake includes file-hosting link instead of inline attachments. F3.FL pre-create intake classification routes to file-hosting-link path; F2.FH state-derived gate marks Vienna as paused per-deal. Distinct from B10: C04 asserts F3.FL classification routing; B10 asserts F2.FH gate state. Pair to cover the link-submission detection from both axes.
notes: Single-event sequence. Different broker/borrower from B10 to permit cross-scenario assertion attribution. Uses wetransfer-style URL pattern (vs file.io in B10) to vary the link-shape coverage.
